(A10C) Do Not Hospitalize CHAR 1 Identification and background information: advanced directives - do not hospitalize 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
61 A10D A10D_ORGAN_DONATE (A10D) Organ Donation CHAR 1 Identification and background information: advanced directives - organ donation 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
62 A10E A10E_AUTOPSY_REQ (A10E) Autopsy Request CHAR 1 Identification and background information: advanced directives - autopsy request 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
